google.protobuf.Any.description: Contains an arbitrary serialized message along with a @type that describes the type of the serialized message.

@type.description: The type of the serialized message.

google.rpc.Status.description: The `Status` type defines a logical error model that is suitable for different programming environments, including REST APIs and RPC APIs. It is used by [gRPC](https://github.com/grpc). Each `Status` message contains three pieces of data: error code, error message, and error details. You can find out more about this error model and how to work with it in the [API Design Guide](https://cloud.google.com/apis/design/errors).

code.description: The status code, which should be an enum value of [google.rpc.Code][google.rpc.Code].

details.description: A list of messages that carry the error details.  There is a common set of message types for APIs to use.

message.description: A developer-facing error message, which should be in English. Any user-facing error message should be localized and sent in the [google.rpc.Status.details][google.rpc.Status.details] field, or localized by the client.

todo.v1.SyncTodoRequest.description:
SyncTodoRequest is a single client message in the SyncTodos bidirectional
 stream. The action field selects which operation to perform on the server.

action.description: The operation to perform. One of `create`, `update`, or `delete`.

id.description: 目标待办事项 ULID，执行 `delete` 和 `update` 时必填。

todo.description: Payload for `create` and `update` actions. Ignored for `delete`.

update_mask.description:
Field mask used by `update` actions to limit which fields are overwritten.
 Ignored for `create` and `delete`.

todo.v1.Todo.description: Todo is the canonical representation of a todo item.

completed.description: Whether the todo item has been completed.

content.description: Detailed description or notes for the todo item.

create_time.description: Time at which the todo item was created. Server-assigned, read-only.

id.description: 服务端分配的 ULID 唯一标识，创建时忽略。

update_time.description: Time at which the todo item was last modified. Server-assigned, read-only.

todo.v1.TodoEvent.description:
TodoEvent is a server-sent message describing a change to a todo item.
 It is emitted by both WatchTodos and SyncTodos streams.

action.description: The change that occurred. One of `created`, `updated`, or `deleted`.

event_time.description: Time at which the change was observed by the server.

todo.description:
The todo item after the change. For `deleted` events only the id field
 is guaranteed to be populated.

type.description:
Machine-readable event type.

枚举值：
- `TODO_EVENT_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED`: Default value used when the event type is unknown.
- `TODO_EVENT_TYPE_CREATED`: A todo item was created.
- `TODO_EVENT_TYPE_UPDATED`: A todo item was updated.
- `TODO_EVENT_TYPE_DELETED`: A todo item was deleted.
- `TODO_EVENT_TYPE_SNAPSHOT`: A snapshot event emitted when a stream is first opened.
x-enum-descriptions: Default value used when the event type is unknown.
A snapshot event emitted when a stream is first opened.

todo.v1.TodoSet.description: TodoSet is a paginated collection of todo items returned by ListTodos.

next_page_token.description:
Token used to retrieve the next page via ListTodosRequest.page_token.
 Empty when there are no more results.

todos.description: The page of todo items in the order requested by ListTodosRequest.order_by.

info.description: 全量模块 OpenAPI 聚合文档。
info.title: API Bundle

post.description:
CreateTodo creates a new todo item and returns the persisted record
 with the server-assigned id, create_time, and update_time populated.
 Returns INVALID_ARGUMENT if the request payload fails validation.
post.summary: CreateTodo creates a new todo item and returns the persisted record

get.description:
ListTodos returns a page of todo items, optionally filtered and ordered.
 Use the next_page_token from TodoSet to retrieve subsequent pages.
 Returns INVALID_ARGUMENT if filter, order_by, or page_token are malformed.

parameters.description:
Optional. Maximum number of todo items to return in a single page.
 The server may apply a default and a maximum when unset or out of range.
parameters.name: page_size

parameters.description:
Optional. Token from a previous response's next_page_token used to fetch
 the next page. Leave empty to request the first page.
parameters.name: page_token

parameters.description:
Optional. The standard list filter.
 Supported fields:
    * `title` (i.e. `title:"bug"`)
    * `content` (i.e. `content:"docs"`)
    * `completed` (i.e. `completed` or `NOT completed`)
    * `create_time` range (i.e. `create_time>="2026-01-01T00:00:00Z"`)
parameters.name: filter

parameters.description:
Optional. A comma-separated list of fields to order by.
 Supported fields:
    * `id`
    * `title`
    * `create_time`
    * `update_time`
 Append ` desc` to a field for descending order, e.g. `create_time desc`.
 Defaults to ascending order when no direction is supplied.
parameters.name: order_by

get.summary: ListTodos returns a page of todo items, optionally filtered and ordered.

post.description:
SyncTodos opens a bidirectional stream for two-way synchronization.
 The client sends SyncTodoRequest messages describing local changes, and
 the server pushes back TodoEvent messages reflecting the resulting state.
 The stream stays open until either side closes it.
post.summary: SyncTodos opens a bidirectional stream for two-way synchronization.

put.description:
UpdateTodo applies a partial update to an existing todo item using a
 FieldMask. Only the fields listed in update_mask are overwritten; all
 other fields are left unchanged.
 Returns NOT_FOUND if the target todo does not exist, or
 INVALID_ARGUMENT if update_mask references unknown fields.

parameters.description:
Set of field paths in todo to overwrite. Fields not listed are left
 unchanged. Use a single path of `*` to replace every mutable field.
parameters.name: update_mask

put.summary: UpdateTodo applies a partial update to an existing todo item using a

get.description:
Returns a `text/event-stream` response. Each frame carries a serialized
`TodoEvent` message in the SSE `data:` field.

parameters.description:
Optional. Maximum number of todo items returned in the initial snapshot
 before live events begin streaming.
parameters.name: page_size

parameters.description: Optional. Page token used to resume from a prior snapshot.
parameters.name: page_token

parameters.description: Optional. List filter expression. Same syntax as ListTodosRequest.filter.
parameters.name: filter

parameters.description: Optional. Order specification. Same syntax as ListTodosRequest.order_by.
parameters.name: order_by

Cache-Control.description: Prevent clients and proxies from caching the stream.

Connection.description: Keep the HTTP connection open for streaming.

X-Accel-Buffering.description: Disable buffering in Nginx-compatible reverse proxies.

delete.description:
DeleteTodo permanently removes a todo item by its id.
 Returns NOT_FOUND if no todo exists with the supplied id.

parameters.description: 要删除的待办事项 ULID。
parameters.name: id

delete.summary: DeleteTodo permanently removes a todo item by its id.

get.description:
GetTodo returns a single todo item by its id.
 Returns NOT_FOUND if no todo exists with the supplied id.

parameters.description: 要查询的待办事项 ULID。
parameters.name: id

get.summary: GetTodo returns a single todo item by its id.
